title: CS WARP
description:
CS_WARP – Aesthetic Teleport Plugin
A fully customizable warp system with 5-second countdown, particles, sounds, and cinematic title effects. Lightweight, lag-free, and built for Paper 1.21+ — every teleport feels smooth, stylish, and configurable.
body:
⚡ CS_WARP – Smart & Cinematic Teleport Plugin
A lightweight and fully customizable warp system for Paper 1.21+
Create, delete, and teleport to warps with a 5-second animated countdown, light-blue particle effects, smooth sounds, and beautiful title messages.
Includes warp list display, tab autocomplete, auto-heal, safe teleport, and configurable cooldowns — all settings editable in config.yml.
